data.title: feat: phase 5 plan 2 — routing skill, hook fallback, settings wiring
data.description:
Part of #9 (Claude's Home v2.0). Depends on phase 5 plan 1 issue.

Implements ROADMAP Phase 5, Plan 2.

## Requirements covered

* CHAT-06: Skill teaches Claude to detect and route channel messages
* CHAT-07: Hook fallback calls the same routing script as the instruction path (no divergence)

## Deliverables

* `.claude/skills/phase5.md` (or equivalent) — routing skill [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>)
* Hook entry in `settings.json` wiring `bin/route-message.sh` as fallback
* Verification that skill and hook use the same code path

## Success criteria

1. Claude instructions (skill) teach Claude to detect and route channel messages
2. Hook fallback calls the same routing script — no divergence between skill and hook paths
3. Browser/channel verification of end-to-end flow
